title: hieracium scorzonerifolium subsp. turritum
intro: Hieracium scorzonerifolium subsp. turritum is a subspecies of the Hieracium scorzonerifolium plant, commonly known as a type of hawkweed. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium scorzonerifolium subsp. turritum are attributed to its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, but further research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy as a medicinal plant.
